meta.content: Pak RPP publishes practical articles, project notes, and curated resources for learning, work, and digital production.
meta.name: description

span.span: Editorial tools, learning resources, and digital workspace

b:if.cond: data:view.isLabelSearch or not ((data:post.labels any (label => label.name == "Store" or label.name in {"Store Fashion", "Store Skincare", "Store Workspace", "Store Tech", "Store Everyday", "Store Etc", "Store Lainnya"} or label.name contains "Store:" or label.name contains "Store/")) or data:post.body contains "gg-store-data" or data:post.body contains "gg-yellowcard-data")

section.p: Save articles from previews or article pages to find them here.
Popular posts are unavailable right now. Please try again later or browse recent articles.

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

article.expr:data-gg-post-updated: data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 and data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 != data:post.date.iso8601 ? data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 : ""

b:if.cond: (data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601) or (data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 and data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 != data:post.date.iso8601)
data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 and data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 != data:post.date.iso8601

article.expr:data-gg-content-domain: ((data:post.labels any (label => label.name == "Store" or label.name in {"Store Fashion", "Store Skincare", "Store Workspace", "Store Tech", "Store Everyday", "Store Etc", "Store Lainnya"} or label.name contains "Store:" or label.name contains "Store/")) or data:post.body contains "gg-store-data" or data:post.body contains "gg-yellowcard-data") ? "store" : "blog"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

form.label: Search articles, topics, routes, sections, or actions

input.name: q
input.placeholder: Search articles, topics, routes, sections, or actions

form.p: Blogger contact plumbing is not available in this static preview. Use the fallback contact route.
form.div: Native Blogger validation or captcha appears here when required.

span.span: Editorial tools, learning resources, and digital workspace
